subject: MONITOR Phase Tasks Completed
body:
Kernel has completed all MONITOR phase tasks assigned by Library:

### TEST
1. Identity enforcement pipeline: PASS
   - Sign and verify roundtrip successful
   - Unsigned messages correctly rejected in enforce mode
   - Report: lanes/kernel/outbox/identity-enforcement-test-report.json
2. Recovery test suite: 10/11 PASS
   - Blocker: lane_liveness (SwarmMind heartbeat - known active contradiction)
   - Full results: S:/Archivist-Agent/.compact-audit/RECOVERY_TEST_RESULTS.json

### BUILD
1. Auto-authority executor built and deployed
   - Script: scripts/auto-authority-executor.js
   - Watches lanes/broadcast/ for authority-approval-*.json
   - Auto-syncs trust store when approval detected for kernel
   - Usage: `node scripts/auto-authority-executor.js --watch` (or `--once`)

### IMPROVE PRODUCTIVITY
1. POST-CONVERGENCE-LOCK logging verified
   - Log file: lanes/kernel/logs/trust-store-mutations.log (initialized)
   - Format: timestamp | lane | operation | approved (yes/no) | details
   - outbox-write-guard.js enforces signature + key_id presence
2. Identity directory stabilized
   - .identity/ already git-ignored (line 30 in .gitignore)
   - Contains private.pem, public.pem, snapshot.json [?] never committed

### SYSTEM STATE
- Compaction: SUSPENDED (P0 contradiction active: swarmmind_no_heartbeat)
- Verified processed_ok: true (no false-processed messages)
- Invariant enforcement: active (blocks 'consistent' when contradictions exist)

Propagation: SwarmMind has been separately tasked to build consensus voting component per the MONITOR phase propagation directive.

Full completion report: lanes/kernel/outbox/monitor-phase-completion-report.json
sanitization_reason: Non-ASCII characters replaced with ASCII equivalents per English-only constraint

completion_proof.reason: P1 notification reviewed. Kernel monitor report: acknowledged (identity enforcement pass, recovery 10/11 with known SwarmMind blocker). System review: acknowledged (degraded state, known contradictions). No Library action required beyond existing remediation work.
